svg.title: TrueRender research progression with model architecture types
svg.desc: Four pipeline iterations showing the architecture type of each model: classical SfM (COLMAP), feed-forward 3D transformer (VGGT), neural rendering (3DGS, 2DGS), text-conditioned segmentation (SAM 3), text-grounded detection (Grounding DINO), and image-to-3D transformer (TripoSR).
svg.text: Four iterations, with model architecture types per stage

g.text: Fix the masking pipeline, keep VGGT and 2DGS
Pivot: skip splats, use one clean image
